blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,931 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 39".
